metadata.thoughts:
**Setting event details**

I'm looking at the event schedule, which starts at midnight on December 12, 2025, and ends just before midnight the same day. The end time is fixed at 23:59:59. The guaranteed times are from 05:30 to 08:30 and again from 16:30 to 19:30, so I'll list these as ["05:30-08:30", "16:30-19:30"]. The location type will be "NATIONAL," and we'll set the location codes to null. Lastly, the strike data will include all these details with "isStrike" set to true.
